message:
fix(parser): flatten colon-separated SGR sub-parameters instead of discarding them

VteAdapter::csi_dispatch() and hook() used .first() on each vte subparam
group, which silently dropped all but the first value in colon-separated
sequences. This broke ITU T.416 RGB color parsing: ESC[38:2:255:128:0m
was reduced to just [38] instead of [38, 2, 255, 128, 0], causing
parse_sgr to never see the color mode or RGB components.

Replace .map(|sp| sp.first()...) with .flat_map(|sp| sp.iter()...) so
every sub-parameter is preserved as a sequential i64 value, which is
exactly what parse_sgr expects.

Closes #47

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
